login_sub: Pick a provider to sign in. Your email needs to be on the list.
login_error_not_authorized: Your email isn't on the access list. Ask the admin to add you.
login_error_server: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
login_error_unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login_error_copy_hint: Copy this and show it to Kevin — he'll know what to do:
login_footer: Access is invite-only. No account? Ask the person who sent you here.
not_authorized_sub: Your email isn't on the list. Ask the person who runs this to add you, then try again.
no_access_finance_sub: Looks like you haven't been granted access to Finance yet. Ask Kevin nicely and maybe he'll let you in.
no_access_generic_sub: Your account hasn't been granted access to {app}. Contact the admin to request access.
